title: [trustless://interop.landscape] Workshop - Faster canonical bridges with multi-proofs
description:
Faster withdrawals from canonical bridges make interop cheaper. And it’s easy to make withdrawals faster. But doing it safely (without adding risk for chain operators or for users) is less easy. This session with Paul Dowman (Optimism, Proofs Team Engineering Manager) will explore the motivations for faster withdrawals and the design space of solutions.

Workshop given during day 2 of the trustless:// conference at Devconnect Argentina 2025

https://trustlessconference.com
